ClientAccount.title: ClientAccount
ClientAccount.description: User customer account for credits, tracking CV builds, and signups

id.description: Auth UID of the registered client

credits.description: Remaining credit points available to purchase/enhance resumes

resumesCreated.description: Aggregate count of documents generated by this client

joinedAt.description: Date format string when client signed up

CVProfile.title: CVProfile
CVProfile.description: User CV or Resume details, contact data, experiences, and styling properties

Voucher.title: Voucher
Voucher.description: Pre-paid voucher records loaded by partners or admins

value.description: Credits to deposit to user when entered

active.description: True if ready to use; false if already claimed

AppConfig.title: AppConfig
AppConfig.description: Platform config definitions, and register default gift allocations

/users/{userId}.description: Primary user profiles with dynamic credits, matching Auth status

/users/{userId}/resumes/{resumeId}.description: Draft or enhanced resumes owned by the particular user

/config/brand.description: Global custom styling options managed by platform admins
